title: Goety:Ladder
description: An auxiliary module for the Wicked Witchcraft system, designed to expand upon the core content of Wicked Witchcraft while introducing additional original content.
body:
Goety: Ladder is an add-on mod for Goety, designed to expand the base game's content and introduce original elements. Future updates will include approximately 4 content additions:)

More Crystals: Adds advanced crystals derived from Goety

More Rituals: Introduces additional ritual types for item synthesis

More Minions: Adds original minions for player interaction

More Structure Creatures: Expands with more ruins and creatures to explore and challenge

This mod offers Goety players a wider variety of choices while maintaining seamless integration with the original style. Future updates will continuously enrich your magical experience with more original content and mechanics!
